title: Fried Herbal Goat Meat Stir-fry
description: A herbal and dense Greek-inspired dish featuring crispy fried goat meat with a touch of sweetness from honey, perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Red Peppers
ingredients.notes: Sliced into thin strips for color and flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced goat meat to the skillet and fry until golden brown on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Drizzle honey evenly over the goat meat mixture and stir well to coat.
Add red pepper strips and green onions. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until greens wilt slightly.
Serve hot with a side of Greek yogurt or a simple salad.
